item.name: Hi-aetherlouse
item.description:
An aetherially charged wavekin that has a habit of appearing when one least expects or wants it.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Some sailors doubt the existence of the so-called “spectral currents,” but one look at this wavekin is enough to set their misgivings to rest for good. It is also enough to set their minds racing with images of finding such an abomination on the decks of their ships─or worse, under their bedcovers.
